title: DEKTON 75FT Hose & Spray Nozzle Set | Durable 75 Feet Garden Hose with 7 Function Spray Nozzle | Ideal for Watering Plants, Cleaning, and More | Flexible, Kink-Resistant Hose with Leak-Free Fittings
features: Complete Garden Hose Set: The Dekton 75FT Hose & Spray Nozzle Set includes a flexible 75 feet garden hose and an adjustable 7 function spray nozzle, perfect for watering plants, cleaning, and general outdoor use. This all-in-one set provides a reliable solution for all your watering needs.

Durable & Kink-Resistant: Made from high-quality materials, the 75 feet hose is designed to be flexible and resistant to kinks, ensuring smooth water flow at all times. Its durable construction prevents wear and tear, providing long-lasting performance for your outdoor tasks.

Adjustable Spray Nozzle: The included spray nozzle features 7 adjustable settings, allowing you to easily switch between various spray patterns. Whether you need a gentle mist for delicate plants or a powerful jet for cleaning, this nozzle has the right option for every task.

Leak-Free Fittings: Equipped with secure, leak-free fittings, this hose and nozzle set ensures a tight, reliable connection to taps and sprinklers. The strong fittings prevent water wastage, giving you efficient and effective watering for your garden or outdoor areas.

Versatile & Easy to Use: Suitable for a wide range of applications, from watering plants and lawns to washing vehicles and outdoor surfaces. The lightweight, flexible design makes the hose easy to maneuver, ensuring a hassle-free experience during every use.
description: The Dekton 75FT Hose & Spray Nozzle Set is your ultimate outdoor watering solution, designed to provide flexibility, durability, and ease of use. This set includes a 75 feet kink-resistant garden hose, ensuring smooth and uninterrupted water flow, and an adjustable spray nozzle with 7 multiple settings for versatile watering options. Whether you’re gently misting delicate flowers or using a powerful jet for cleaning, the spray nozzle adapts to your needs. Crafted from durable materials, this hose withstands wear and tear, providing long-lasting use throughout the seasons. The secure, leak-free fittings prevent water wastage, ensuring efficient watering while saving water. Perfect for a wide range of outdoor tasks, including gardening, cleaning, and washing vehicles, the lightweight design makes it easy to handle. Upgrade your outdoor chores with the Dekton 15M Hose & Spray Nozzle Set for a convenient, reliable watering experience.
